skill.name: ngx-brand-voice
skill.description: Guía completa de voz de marca NGX "Verdad Directa" con modos de comunicación, adaptación por audiencia y ejemplos aprobados
skill.summary: Guides NGX copywriting with the Verdad Directa brand voice, audience adaptation, and review steps.
skill.author: 270aldo

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged Markdown backtick spans and a weak-cryptography pattern, but both are false positives. No executable code, network access, filesystem operations, secret handling, or prompt injection attempts were found in the single reviewed file.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Static Finding: Markdown Filenames Misread as Commands
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: Lines 20-24 contain Markdown code spans naming referenced documentation files. They do not execute shell, Ruby, or other external commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The backticks are inside a Markdown list and wrap filenames such as voice-guide.md. There is no command syntax, interpreter directive, script block, or user input execution path.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Static Finding: Weak Cryptography Pattern
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: Line 3 is frontmatter text describing the skill. It contains no hash function, encryption routine, credential handling, or cryptographic implementation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The inspected line is a natural-language description in Spanish. No evidence of MD5, SHA1, DES, RC4, or other weak cryptographic algorithm use appears on that line.

content.value_statement: Teams need NGX marketing copy that stays consistent across audiences and channels. This skill provides a concise Verdad Directa workflow for drafting, adapting, and reviewing copy.
actual_capabilities: Guides NGX copywriting with the Verdad Directa brand voice.
Defines when to use the skill for writing, adaptation, validation, and examples.
Identifies audience ranges of 30-45 and 45-60 for copy adaptation.
References communication modes A, B, and C for message selection.
Applies the CONFRONTA, FUNDAMENTA, RESUELVE structure for conversion copy.
Prompts users to review copy before final publication.
limitations: Only SKILL.md is present in the reviewed package.
Referenced support files, including the checklist and examples, are not included.
The skill gives workflow guidance but does not provide complete brand rules.
It does not validate claims, legal compliance, or factual accuracy.

use_cases.title: Draft Campaign Copy
use_cases.description: Create NGX promotional copy using the named audience range, mode, and conversion structure.

use_cases.title: Adapt Existing Messaging
use_cases.description: Rewrite a draft for either the 30-45 or 45-60 audience segment while preserving the NGX voice.

use_cases.title: Review Pre-Publication Text
use_cases.description: Check whether a draft follows the available NGX voice workflow and identify needed corrections.

prompt_templates.title: Draft Basic Copy
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a short marketing message.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the ngx-brand-voice skill to write NGX copy for [channel]. Audience: [30-45 or 45-60]. Goal: [goal].

prompt_templates.title: Adapt by Audience
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request to adjust a draft for a defined age segment.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the NGX Verdad Directa voice to adapt this copy for the [30-45 or 45-60] audience: [paste copy].

prompt_templates.title: Build Conversion Copy
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request using the named conversion formula.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create NGX conversion copy using CONFRONTA, FUNDAMENTA, RESUELVE. Audience: [segment]. Offer: [offer]. Objection: [objection].

prompt_templates.title: Audit and Rewrite
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced review request for a draft that needs voice alignment.
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this NGX draft against the available brand voice workflow. Then rewrite it and explain the main corrections: [paste draft].

output_examples.input: Write NGX copy for a 45-60 audience about improving daily performance.
output_examples.output: A concise message that confronts the audience problem, supports the claim with a clear reason, and presents NGX as the practical next step.

output_examples.input: Adapt this draft for a 30-45 audience while keeping the NGX voice.
output_examples.output: A revised version with more direct framing, sharper benefit language, and a tone aligned with the requested audience.

output_examples.input: Check whether this NGX landing page section follows the brand voice.
output: Voice alignment notes for the draft.
Specific issues to correct before publication.
A revised version that follows the available workflow.

best_practices: Provide the target audience before asking for copy.
Name the channel and conversion goal in the prompt.
Review factual, medical, legal, and performance claims before publishing.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for final brand approval from this skill alone.
Do not rely on missing referenced files as if they are included.
Do not publish generated claims without independent verification.

faq.question: What does this skill help create?
faq.answer: It helps create and review NGX marketing copy using the Verdad Directa brand voice workflow.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Does the package include the full voice guide?
faq.answer: No. The reviewed package contains only SKILL.md, which references other files that are not present.

faq.question: Can it adapt copy by audience?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill references adaptation for 30-45 and 45-60 audience segments.

faq.question: Can it approve copy for publication?
faq.answer: No. It can support review, but a human should verify brand, factual, and compliance requirements.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The reviewed file contains guidance text only, and the static security findings were false positives.
